lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Never mind!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello.

lines.speaker: The Face
lines.text: Oh. It's you again.

lines.speaker: The Face
lines.text: That was an amazing performance! I've only seen one like it... as you know.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Don't worry, Felkrash has no idea how I figured it out.

lines.speaker: The Face
lines.text: And it had better stay that way!

lines.speaker: The Face
lines.text: Here you go.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello.

sections.title: Attempting to enter the manhole before Smokin' Joe tells the player about The Face in Ratcatchers

lines.speaker: The Face
lines.text: Step away from that manhole, you've no business down there.

sections.title: After helping Smokin' Joe, before talking to Felkrash

lines.speaker: The Face
lines.text: Ah you, peasant. Felkrash wishes to speak with you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ok, where would I find her?

lines.speaker: The Face
lines.text: You should find her below in the pits.

sections.title: After talking to Felkrash the first time

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello.

lines.speaker: The Face
lines.text: Oh it's you again. *She glances at you with barely disguised disdain.*

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: *Aside* I wonder what her problem is?

lines.speaker: The Face
lines.text: Have you spoken with Felkrash yet?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That's an interesting looking cat.

lines.speaker: The Face
lines.text: Ah yes Belle. What a cat. Felkrash trained her for me shortly after she single handedly charmed all the rats of the Port and drowned them.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I love that story. My favourite part is how she managed to get rid of all the rats. Would you tell it to me?

lines.speaker: The Face
lines.text: I don't know, I really shouldn't.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: *Aside* I'll get the story out of her, a little sweet talking should do the trick.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh please tell me, I'm sure you'd tell the story wonderfully, you have such a pretty ...

lines.speaker: The Face
lines.text: Yes..?

lines.speaker: The Face
lines.text: *The face's[sic] face perks up at the mention of the word pretty.*

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: ...voice.

lines.speaker: The Face
lines.text: Oh. *And just as quickly turns sour again.*

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: *Aside* Dang!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: ... which compliments your radiant aura!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: *Aside* That should do the trick.

lines.speaker: The Face
lines.text: Oh you're too generous.

lines.speaker: The Face
lines.text: Do you know something, I think I'll tell you, mind you, don't tell Felkrash about this, she'd only get sore with me.

lines.speaker: The Face
lines.text: She's the story teller not me.

lines.speaker: The Face
lines.text: One day ......

lines.speaker: The Face
lines.text: One day ......

lines.speaker: The Face
lines.text: And that is how she drowned the rats.

lines.speaker: The Face
lines.text: ..and that is how she drowned the rats.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: *Aside*Perhaps[sic] I should pay this snake charmer a visit.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello.

lines.speaker: The Face
lines.text: Oh it's you again. *She glances at you with barely disguised disdain.*

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: *Aside* I wonder what her problem is?

lines.speaker: The Face
lines.text: Felkrash told me of the task she set you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Really?

lines.speaker: The Face
lines.text: I shouldn't have told that story. Shame on you for coaxing it out of me.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I promise I won't tell her you helped me.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello.

lines.speaker: The Face
lines.text: Oh it's you again. *She glances at you with barely disguised disdain.*

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: *Aside* I wonder what her problem is?

lines.speaker: The Face
lines.text: I must congratulate you on your performance, I have only ever seen one other display of musicality to match, as you should know.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thank you, and don't worry, I won't tell Felkrash that you helped me.
